items.titleZh: OpenAI 害怕开放权重模型。美国应该如此吗？
items.titleEn: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
items.summaryZh: TechCrunch AI 报道了人工智能的模型开发。消息来源的要点：禁止中国制造的开放式法学硕士的言论揭示了将人工智能转变为商业的挑战。
items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“OpenAI 害怕开放权重模型。美国应该害怕吗？”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?”.

items.titleZh: 在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 通过代理和物理 AI 推进图形和模拟
items.titleEn: At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI
items.summaryZh: NVIDIA 博客报道了人工智能的模型开发。来源要点：从开放模型到实时模拟，人工智能和图形突破正在改变媒体、内容创建和机器人技术。
items.summaryEn: NVIDIA Blog reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: From open models to real-time simulation, AI and graphics breakthroughs are transforming media, content creation and robotics.
items.overviewZh: NVIDIA 博客发布了有关“在 SIGGRAPH 上，NVIDIA 通过代理和物理 AI 推进图形和模拟”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: NVIDIA Blog published a new update about “At SIGGRAPH, NVIDIA Advances Graphics and Simulation With Agentic and Physical AI”.

items.titleZh: 长视野模型时代的安全性和对准
items.titleEn: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报告了人工智能的政策发展。来源要点：OpenAI 分享了部署长期运行的人工智能模型的经验教训，强调了新的安全风险、观察到的故障以及通过迭代部署改进的保障措施。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports a policy development in AI. Key point from the source: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“长视野模型时代的安全性和一致性”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models”.

items.titleZh: Adobe 的“自然外观”相机应用程序拥抱生成式 AI
items.titleEn: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
items.summaryZh: The Verge AI 报道了人工智能的行业发展。消息来源的关键点：Adobe 的实验性相机应用程序出现了意想不到的转变。
items.summaryEn: The Verge AI reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn.
items.overviewZh: The Verge AI 发布了有关“Adobe 的‘自然外观’相机应用程序拥抱生成式 AI”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: The Verge AI published a new update about “Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI”.

items.titleZh: 据报道，在 Kimi K3 推出后，特朗普政府以网络安全担忧为由，重新推动禁止中国人工智能模型——可下载的开放权重可能会使美国在采用率不断提高的情况下几乎不可能实施彻底的禁令 - Tom's Hardware
items.titleEn: Trump administration reportedly reviving push to ban Chinese AI models following Kimi K3 launch, citing cybersecurity concerns — downloadable open weights could make an outright U.S. ban nearly impossible to enforce amid growing adoption - Tom's Hardware
items.summaryZh: Google News AI 报道了人工智能模型的开发。消息来源的关键点：据报道，特朗普政府在 Kimi K3 推出后，以网络安全担忧为由，重新推动禁止中国人工智能模型——可下载的开放权重可能会让美国彻底陷入困境。
items.summaryEn: Google News AI reports a model development in AI. Key point from the source: Trump administration reportedly reviving push to ban Chinese AI models following Kimi K3 launch, citing cybersecurity concerns — downloadable open weights could make an outright U.S.
items.overviewZh: 谷歌新闻人工智能发布了一份新的更新，内容是“据报道，特朗普政府在 Kimi K3 推出后，以网络安全担忧为由，重新推动禁止中国人工智能模型——可下载的开放权重可能会使美国的彻底禁令在日益普及的情况下几乎不可能执行——汤姆的硬件”。
items.overviewEn: Google News AI published a new update about “Trump administration reportedly reviving push to ban Chinese AI models following Kimi K3 launch, citing cybersecurity concerns — downloadable open weights could make an outright U.S. ban nearly impossible to enforce amid growing adoption - Tom's Hardware”.
